description.value: > Leadership Associated Domain: Nobility. Replacement Power: The following granted power replaces the inspiring word power of the Nobility domain. Inspiring Command (Su): As a standard action, you can issue an inspiring command to your allies. The inspiring command affects one ally plus one additional ally for every three cleric levels you possess, who must all be within 30 feet of you. Affected allies gain a +2 insight bonus on attack rolls, AC, combat maneuver defense, and skill checks for 1 round. This is a language-dependent mind-affecting effect. Replacement Domain Spells: 1st levelâ bless, 3rdâ prayer, 6thâ brilliant inspiration.
